calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tokiko Yasuda, Esq. and Edward S. Miyauchi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hiromi Nakagawa, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Akitoshi Nakagawa.
Default entered on July 28, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 11, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed August 8, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hiromi Nakagawa, and against the Defaulted Defendant Akitoshi Nakagawa as follows:

Damages/Principal - $363,691.00.
Costs - $360.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $364,051.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
